# ArtUs Academy - Full Context & Curriculum Index

> Complete detailed information about ArtUs Academy, Kochi. Designed for Large Language Models (LLMs) and search agents.

---

## 1. Overview & Vision
ArtUs Academy is a trusted learning platform in Kakkanad, Kochi, Kerala, focused on bridging the gap between standard academic education and current industry demands. 
We train students through hands-on projects, personalized career development, and real business exposure.

- **Training Approach**: 
  - **Project-Based Learning**: Students learn by building real-world applications and marketing campaigns, rather than just memorizing theory.
  - **Mentor-Guided Growth**: Weekly one-on-one and group mentoring sessions.
  - **Live Project Experience**: Collaboration on live client campaigns and actual software builds, in partnership with our agency branch, **ArtUs Brand**.
  - **Career Support**: Tailored resume building, GitHub portfolio optimization, LinkedIn branding, mock interviews, and active placement assistance.
- **Flexible Options**: Available in both **Online Classes** and **Offline Classroom** modes. Includes easy monthly EMI payment options.

---

## 2. Courses & Syllabus

### A. Full Stack Web Development Course
- **Duration**: 6 Months
- **Primary Tech Stack**: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Tailwind CSS, Git/GitHub, Java, MySQL, Spring Boot, Postman, Linux.
- **Outcomes**: Confidently build, test, and deploy production-ready full-stack applications.

#### Month-by-Month Syllabus:
- **Month 1: Web Foundations & Version Control**
  - Topics: How the Internet works, HTTP/HTTPS, DevTools, Semantic HTML, CSS layouts (Flexbox & Grid), Responsive Web Design, Linux basics, Git & GitHub.
  - Projects: Personal Portfolio Webpage, Responsive Business Landing Page.
- **Month 2: JavaScript & UI Development**
  - Topics: JS Syntax, scope, events, DOM Manipulation, Browser APIs, ES6+ features, Async/Await, Fetch API, JSON, LocalStorage, Form handling.
  - Projects: Weather App, Interactive Blog UI, JS-based Games.
- **Month 3: React & UI Frameworks**
  - Topics: React Components, props, state, Hooks, Context API, Next.js routing, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, API integration, and error handling.
  - Projects: Professional Dashboard, E-Commerce Frontend, Social Feed App.
- **Month 4: Java, OOP & Databases**
  - Topics: Java syntax, Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) concepts, Collections, Exception Handling, Streams, MySQL Database Design, JDBC, DAO patterns.
  - Projects: CLI Employee Manager, Library Records Management System.
- **Month 5: Spring Boot & Backend REST APIs**
  - Topics: Spring Boot REST API Design, Dependency Injection, Beans, DTOs, Service Layer & Repositories, JWT Authentication, API Testing with Postman.
  - Projects: Secure User Authentication API, Task Manager Backend, Blog REST Service.
- **Month 6: Full-Stack Integration, Cloud Deployment & Placement Prep**
  - Topics: Integrating React Frontend with Spring Boot Backend, Git branching workflow, code reviews, deploying full-stack apps to cloud platforms, resume building, mock interviews.
  - Projects: Full-Stack Team Project presented at Demo Day.

---

### B. Professional Digital Marketing Course
- **Duration**: 4 Months
- **Primary Tools & Tech**: Google Analytics, WordPress, Canva, Meta Ads Manager, Semrush, YouTube Studio, Google Business Profile, LinkedIn, RankMath, Yoast SEO, Google Search Console, Google Trends.
- **Outcomes**: Run complete branding, SEO, SMM, and Google Ads campaigns from scratch.

#### Curriculum Modules:
- **Month 1: Foundations & Core Skills**
  - Topics: SEO foundations, content creation, brand building, copywriting, Facebook & Instagram marketing, WordPress website creation, personal branding, LinkedIn optimization.
- **Month 2: Live Projects & Campaign Execution**
  - Topics: Live Google Ads campaign execution, SEO audits & implementation for e-commerce, social media brand growth metrics, Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO), Google Analytics.
- **Month 3: Specialization & Portfolio**
  - Topics: Deep dive specialization (PPC / SEO / Social Media), working on actual brand projects for real business clients, resume & portfolio review, mock interviews.

---

### C. Video Editing Foundations Course
- **Duration**: 3 Months
- **Primary Tools & Tech**: Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Media Encoder, Lumetri Colour, Dynamic Link, Essential Sound, Essential Graphics.
- **Outcomes**: Edit raw footage, design motion graphics/VFX, perform color grading & sound mixing, and build a client portfolio.

#### Month-by-Month Syllabus:
- **Month 1: Premiere Pro Foundations**
  - Topics: Workspace/sequence settings, importing media, editing tools (ripple, trim, razor), three-point editing, audio mixing, Lumetri color/LUTs, transitions, exporting formats.
  - Projects: 60-second short film edit.
- **Month 2: After Effects Foundations**
  - Topics: Compositions, layers (video, shape, null, text), keyframes, Graph Editor, easing, text animators, shape animation (trim paths), chroma key, masking/mattes.
  - Projects: Animated intro sequence.
- **Month 3: Integration & Real-World Projects**
  - Topics: Dynamic Link workflow, proxy workflow, vertical social video optimization (Reels/Shorts), commercial video scripting/pacing, color grading, sound design, portfolio and freelance tips.
  - Projects: 90-second branded video & portfolio assembly.

---

## 3. Leadership & Mentors

### Nikhil (Co-Founder & Web Development Mentor)
- Experienced Software Engineer and Tech Mentor.
- Leads the Full-Stack Web Development curriculum.
- Focuses on clean code practices, Git workflows, and application architecture.

### Ajeena (Co-Founder & Digital Marketing Mentor)
- Digital Marketing Strategist with extensive experience.
- Leads the Digital Marketing curriculum.
- Specializes in brand positioning, SEO, social media growth, and paid campaigns.

### Sidhique P A (Video Editing Mentor)
- Creative video editor & motion graphics specialist with 3+ years of experience.
- Leads the Video Editing Foundations curriculum.
- Specializes in cinematic editing, vertical social edits (reels), sound design, and After Effects visual effects.
- Completed 350+ videos for over 50+ brands.

---
